title: cyperus cristulatus
intro: Cyperus cristulatus, also known as the yellow nut sedge or dwarf umbrella sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus cristulatus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and its roots and rhizomes are commonly used in traditional medicine to create tonics and remedies.
